name: Close Oversight

abilities.name: Safety First
abilities.text: When this model activates, another friendly model within 3" may gain a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Do the Work
abilities.text: While this model has a Shielded token, it receives a (z) to its tactical actions.

actions.name: Scatter Scrap
actions.effects: Make a Scrap marker within range. Enemy models within (M)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Welding Shield
triggers.text: Allies within (M)2" of the made marker gain a Shielded token.

extraction_notes: Signature action indicated by paragraph symbol (¶) before 'Scatter Scrap'
Trigger indicated by diamond bullet (◆) before 'Welding Shield'
(z) icon used in 'Do the Work' ability text
Shielded tokens referenced throughout but definition not provided on this card
